---
title: "‘The Whole Duty of Young Women’"
---

## ‘The Whole Duty of Young Women’
**Date:** 1859
**Imprint:** <i>Saturday Review</i> (24 December 1859) 768-9

### Notes

A review of  <i>Aggesden Vicarage</i>: ‘in point of literary ability, this seems to us the best of all the imitations of Miss Yonge’.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
